overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing a character walking through a stormy urban night environment. The character travels along city sidewalks, crosses intersections, and follows a group of pedestrians along a street bordered by a large rocky hillside with graffiti-covered walls.

traditional wooden houses with lit windows behind the fence
tall palm trees lining the street ahead
tall modern building with illuminated windows and signage
tall street lamps casting light on the road
multi-lane asphalt road with moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential sidewalk at night, bordered by a black metal fence with traditional houses behind it. Palm trees line the street ahead, and a modern glass tower rises in the distance on the right. The camera turns left to briefly show the houses before continuing forward.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wide urban intersection, passing traffic lights and a utility pole. A white van drives through the intersection as the character steps onto the crosswalk. A large rocky hillside becomes visible on the left side of the street, replacing the residential houses.

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a sidewalk next to the large rocky hillside, which now dominates the left side of the frame. The character catches up to a group of pedestrians walking ahead. A green truck passes on the road to the right as modern street lamps illuminate the path forward.

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the urban street, now passing a concrete retaining wall covered in vibrant graffiti art. The large rocky hillside remains prominent on the left. Commercial buildings appear on the right side of the street as the character follows the group of pedestrians through the stormy night environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy urban night, transitioning from a quiet residential neighborhood into a gritty industrial corridor. It begins on a sidewalk bordered by a black metal fence and traditional houses, with the camera briefly panning left before moving toward a distant glass tower and lining palm trees. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the residential scenery gives way to a massive rocky hillside on the left while a white van crosses the path. The scene then shifts as the character follows a group of pedestrians along the base of the cliff, passing under modern street lamps as a green truck drives by on the right. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal commercial buildings and a concrete retaining wall covered in vibrant graffiti, with the rocky hillside remaining a dominant presence throughout the stormy night.
